title: BareBones VoiceChat
description: An Optimization Modpack with built in voicechat.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7tAxZUYsG-I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Purpose:
An optimized modpack built with Voice Chat on the latest Minecraft versions. This modpack is compatiable with all public multiplayer servers and singleplayer. Performance focused with added quality of life mods and Voice chat to communicate with your friends!

## Features:
* Optimization Mods 
    - Sodium, Indium, lithium and mods for better performance.
* Shader Mods
    - Iris shaders with a few different shader packs to choose from.
* Voice Chat Mod
    - Only works if the multiplayer server you are joining supports the Simple Voice Chat mod. The server requires the SVC plugin for you to be able to use voice chat! Can disable voice chat with the "V" Keybind.
* Added Quality of Life Mods
    - More Information on HUD, Jade, REI, Dark Mode menus and loading screens, Zooming and more.
* Better Animations & Textures Mods
    - More particles, better animations from mobs to other players, better skyboxes, and 3D Skin layers for Minecraft skins.

## Support:
Discord: https://discord.gg/barebonesmp
